datapoints.description: Total storage used by NooBaa in bytes
datapoints.name: total_usage_bytes

description: NooBaa Multi-Cloud Gateway health, bucket counts, and storage usage via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Collects NooBaa MCG metrics from Thanos. NooBaa metric names use CamelCase (e.g., NooBaa_system_health). Metrics may not exist if MCG is not fully deployed; vector(0) fallback returns zeros.
name: ODF_NooBaa_Health
